company.what_they_do: Deloitte is one of the world's largest professional services networks. It provides audit & assurance, consulting, tax, risk advisory, financial advisory, and legal services to clients ranging from startups to Fortune 500 companies. Key service pillars include: external and internal audit, strategy and management consulting (via Monitor Deloitte), digital transformation and customer experience (via Deloitte Digital), technology implementation (ERP, cloud, AI/data), tax compliance and advisory, and risk & financial advisory. Deloitte serves clients across all major industries in 150+ countries with ~470,000 employees and reported ~$70.5B in FY2025 global revenue. It is one of the 'Big Four' professional services firms.
raw_notes: Provides audit, consulting, tax, and advisory services — described on homepage as 'industry-leading'
Serves nearly 90% of Fortune 500 and 9,000+ US-based private companies
180+ years in operation; network spans 150+ countries
Key consulting sub-brands: Monitor Deloitte (strategy), Deloitte Digital (customer/digital), Deloitte Engineering (product/technology build)
Strong AI/data push: homepage highlights AI adoption work (e.g., USGA AI strategy project), AI-enabled systems, and Deloitte's Omnia AI-powered audit platform

Homepage messaging: 'progress starts when people connect... building something greater than the sum of its parts... One challenge at a time' — emphasizes collaboration and cross-functional problem solving
Deloitte Greece is a notable regional office with 2,900+ people, having quadrupled in 6 years under CEO Dimitris Koutsopoulos (since 2015)
Named a Top Ranked Consulting Firm by Management Consulted in 2026
Operates as a global network of legally independent member firms under Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited (DTTL)
